qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist A (serial #9) increases D-round code-change density with at least 4 regex operations per round

executionHints.description: Checklist A (serial #9) keeps guarded fast mode while adding denser helper extraction and call-site routing in D1-D4

d1ResetRequirement.notes: When run range includes D1, use explicit reset to avoid stale code-step invocation state

D1.description: Extract action-source and fallback-none literals, then route normalize and fallback helpers through shared literals

operations.pattern:
static const char\* wc_preclass_normalize_action_source\(const char\* action_source\)?
\{?
	if \(!action_source \|\| !\*action_source\)?
		return "default";?
	return action_source;?
\}

static const char\* wc_preclass_normalize_fallback_reason\(const char\* fallback_reason\)?
\{?
	if \(!fallback_reason \|\| !\*fallback_reason\)?
		return "none";?
	return fallback_reason;?
\}

D2.description: Extract observe-only and hint-disabled literals, then route decision/default action helpers through shared literal functions

operations.pattern:
static const char\* wc_preclass_normalize_decision_action\(const char\* decision_action\)?
\{?
	if \(!decision_action \|\| !\*decision_action\)?
		return "observe-only";?
	return decision_action;?
\}

D3.description: Add output-layer literals and query-kind helper, then route match-layer outputs through the new helpers

D4.description: Centralize route-change flag literals and route all route-change resets/checks through shared flag helpers
